# AiCoding AI Debug Repair Kit Plugin

Bundled skills:

- `ai-debug-kit-deploy`
- `ai-debug-operations`
- `ai-debug-repair-loop`

CLI asset root:

```text
assets/ai-debug-repair-kit
```

Install CLI manually:

```powershell
python -m pip install --user --force-reinstall .\assets\ai-debug-repair-kit
airepair doctor --output json
```
